mapper.select: SELECT r.park_name, r.room_id, r.room_name, b.building_id, b.building_name, f.floor_id, f.floor_name, r.area, r.tenant_status, r.tenant_money, r.tenant_money_type, r.create_time, r.status shelve_status FROM room AS r LEFT JOIN floor AS f ON f.floor_id = r.floor_id AND f.del_flag = 0 LEFT JOIN building AS b ON b.building_id = f.building_id AND b.del_flag = 0 ${ew.customSqlSegment}

SELECT r.park_name, r.room_id, r.room_name, b.building_name, f.floor_name, r.area, r.tenant_status, r.tenant_money, r.tenant_money_type FROM room AS r LEFT JOIN floor AS f ON f.floor_id = r.floor_id AND f.del_flag = 0 LEFT JOIN building AS b ON b.building_id = f.building_id AND b.del_flag = 0 ${ew.customSqlSegment}

SELECT ta.id AS application_id, ta.room_status AS tenant_status, r.park_name, r.room_name, r.room_id, b.building_name, f.floor_name, r.area, r.tenant_money, r.tenant_money_type, ta.apply_time, ta.status AS approval_status, ta.start_time, ta.end_time FROM tenant_application ta INNER JOIN room r ON ta.room_id = r.room_id AND r.del_flag = '0' LEFT JOIN floor f ON r.floor_id = f.floor_id AND f.del_flag = '0' LEFT JOIN building b ON r.building_id = b.building_id AND b.del_flag = '0' ${ew.customSqlSegment}

SELECT r.park_name, r.room_id, r.room_name, b.building_id, b.building_name, f.floor_id, f.floor_name, r.area, r.tenant_money, r.tenant_money_type FROM room AS r LEFT JOIN floor AS f ON f.floor_id = r.floor_id AND f.del_flag = 0 LEFT JOIN building AS b ON b.building_id = f.building_id AND b.del_flag = 0 ${ew.customSqlSegment} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
